config.yml.general_idea: Switch database driver from H2 in-memory to MySQL for production persistence.
Update database connection URL to point to a local MySQL instance with specific connection parameters.
Change database credentials from default H2 user to specific MySQL user.
Set a specific password for the MySQL database connection.
Increase maximum connection pool size to accommodate higher load.
Enable idle connection checking to maintain pool health.
Add SQL validation query for connection pool health checks.
Set timeout for the validation query execution.
Add application metadata configuration including base URL, version, and name.
Configure rate limiting for the application.
Set maximum length for custom short codes.
Remove explicit shutdown grace period configuration, likely relying on defaults or other mechanisms.

dependency-reduced-pom.xml.general_idea: Remove maven-shade-plugin from pluginManagement as it is no longer required or managed in this configuration.
Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag instead of separate source/target flags for better cross-compilation support.
Add MySQL JDBC driver dependency to support database connectivity.
Add JUnit Jupiter API dependency for testing.
Add Mockito Core dependency for mocking in tests.
Add JUnit Jupiter aggregate dependency for testing.
Add Dropwizard Testing dependency for integration testing.
Add JUnit BOM to dependencyManagement to manage JUnit versions centrally.
Set maven.compiler.release property to 21 to target Java 21.
Define junit.version property for version management.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add MySQL JDBC driver dependency to support MySQL database connectivity.
Add JUnit 5 BOM to manage test dependency versions.
Add JUnit Jupiter API dependency for writing tests.
Add Mockito Core dependency for mocking in tests.
Add JUnit Jupiter engine dependency for running tests.
Add Dropwizard Testing dependency for integration testing support.
Remove maven-shade-plugin from plugin management as it is no longer needed or managed explicitly.

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.general_idea: Add Jdbi v3 and Dropwizard configuration imports to support database access and environment variable substitution.
Add imports for new resource and service classes added in Phase 2.
Fix class declaration formatting to comply with standard Java style (single line).
Add Jdbi instance field and getter to expose the database interface to the application.
Configure Dropwizard to substitute environment variables in configuration files.
Update health check registration to use dynamic application name and version from configuration.
Initialize Jdbi with the data source and install the SQL Object plugin.
Create DAO instances using Jdbi on-demand factory.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.after:
LinkDAO linkDAO = this.jdbi.onDemand(LinkDAO.class);
ClickDAO clickDAO = this.jdbi.onDemand(ClickDAO.class);

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.general_idea: Instantiate service and resource classes with their dependencies.
Register new JAX-RS resources with the Jersey environment.
Remove unused import for MigrationsBundle to clean up the source file.
Add import for NotBlank validation constraint.
Add nested ApplicationConfiguration class with fields and getters/setters to support dynamic application settings.
Add application field and its getter/setter to the main configuration class.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.after: private ApplicationConfiguration application = new ApplicationConfiguration(); ... public ApplicationConfiguration getApplication() ...

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/core/Link.general_idea: Add clickCount field to track the number of times a link has been accessed.
Remove automatic timestamp initialization in constructor to rely on database default.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/core/Link.after: // createdAt will be set by database DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/core/Link.general_idea: Add getter and setter methods for the new clickCount field.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/core/Link.after: public Integer getClickCount() { return clickCount; } public void setClickCount(Integer clickCount) { this.clickCount = clickCount; }

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.general_idea: Add a method to update the short_code of an existing link.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.after:
@SqlUpdate("UPDATE links SET short_code = :shortCode WHERE id = :id")
    void updateShortCode(@Bind("id") long id, @Bind("shortCode") String shortCode);

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.general_idea: Add a method to increment the click count for telemetry tracking.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.after:
@SqlUpdate("UPDATE links SET click_count = click_count + 1 WHERE id = :id")
    void incrementClickCount(@Bind("id") long id);

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/health/Ba.general_idea: Refactor health check to support dynamic application name instead of hardcoded string.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/health/Ba.before: return Result.healthy("URL Shortener API is running. Version: " + version);
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/health/Ba.after: return Result.healthy(applicationName + " is running. Version: " + version);

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/health/Da.general_idea: Replace simple connection state check with an actual SQL query execution to verify database connectivity.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/health/Da.before: return Result.healthy("Database is healthy and connected.");
